sentences.text: If you want to pass the driving test, you should practice parallel parking regularly.
sentences.translation_zh: 如果你想通过驾驶考试，你应该经常练习侧方停车。
sentences.translation_vi: Neu ban muon vuot qua ky thi lai xe, ban nen luyen tap do xe song song thuong xuyen.

sentences.text: The mechanic told me that the engine needs to be repaired before next week.
sentences.translation_zh: 修理工告诉我，发动机需要在下周之前修理。
sentences.translation_vi: Tho may noi voi toi rang dong co can duoc sua chua truoc tuan toi.

sentences.text: Although electric cars are more expensive, they are much better for the environment.
sentences.translation_zh: 虽然电动汽车更贵，但它们对环境好得多。
sentences.translation_vi: Mac du xe dien dat hon, chung tot hon nhieu cho moi truong.

sentences.text: You must always wear your seatbelt when the car is moving.
sentences.translation_zh: 当汽车行驶时，你必须始终系好安全带。
sentences.translation_vi: Ban phai luon doi day an toan khi xe dang chay.

sentences.text: The traffic was so heavy that it took us two hours to get home.
sentences.translation_zh: 交通太拥堵了，花了我们两个小时才到家。
sentences.translation_vi: Giao thong dong duc den noi chung toi mat hai tieng moi ve den nha.

sentences.text: My car was stolen from the parking lot while I was shopping at the mall.
sentences.translation_zh: 当我在商场购物时，我的车从停车场被偷了。
sentences.translation_vi: Xe cua toi bi trom tu bai do xe khi toi dang mua sam tai trung tam thuong mai.

sentences.text: Before you start the engine, make sure that all mirrors are adjusted properly.
sentences.translation_zh: 在启动发动机之前，确保所有后视镜都已正确调整。
sentences.translation_vi: Truoc khi khoi dong dong co, hay dam bao rang tat ca guong da duoc chinh dung.

sentences.text: I have been driving for ten years, but I still find highway merging stressful.
sentences.translation_zh: 我已经开了十年车了，但我仍然觉得高速公路合流很有压力。
sentences.translation_vi: Toi da lai xe muoi nam roi, nhung toi van thay nhap lan cao toc cang thang.

sentences.text: The GPS suggested an alternative route because there was an accident on the main road.
sentences.translation_zh: GPS建议了一条替代路线，因为主路上发生了事故。
sentences.translation_vi: GPS goi y mot tuyen duong thay the vi co mot tai nan tren duong chinh.

sentences.text: The speed limit on this road is sixty kilometers per hour, so please slow down.
sentences.translation_zh: 这条路的限速是每小时六十公里，所以请减速。
sentences.translation_vi: Toc do gioi han tren con duong nay la sau muoi ki lo met moi gio, vay hay giam toc do.

sentences.text: I need to take my car to the garage because the brakes are making a strange noise.
sentences.translation_zh: 我需要把车送到修理厂，因为刹车发出奇怪的声音。
sentences.translation_vi: Toi can dem xe di sua vi thang dang phat ra tieng dong la.

sentences.text: When you approach a roundabout, you should give way to traffic that is already circulating.
sentences.translation_zh: 当你接近环形交叉路口时，你应该让行已经在环内行驶的车辆。
sentences.translation_vi: Khi ban den gan vong xuyen, ban nen nhuong duong cho xe da dang luu thong.

sentences.text: The insurance company requires that all drivers report any accidents within twenty-four hours.
sentences.translation_zh: 保险公司要求所有司机在二十四小时内报告任何事故。
sentences.translation_vi: Cong ty bao hiem yeu cau tat ca tai xe bao cao moi tai nan trong vong hai muoi bon gio.

sentences.text: Hybrid vehicles, which combine an electric motor with a petrol engine, have become increasingly popular.
sentences.translation_zh: 混合动力汽车将电动马达和汽油发动机结合在一起，已经变得越来越受欢迎。
sentences.translation_vi: Xe lai, ket hop dong co dien voi dong co xang, da tro nen ngay cang pho bien.

sentences.text: If the tire pressure warning light comes on, you should pull over and check all four tires immediately.
sentences.translation_zh: 如果胎压警告灯亮起，你应该靠边停车并立即检查所有四个轮胎。
sentences.translation_vi: Neu den canh bao ap suat lop sang, ban nen dung lai va kiem tra ca bon lop ngay lap tuc.
